<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Subscription Events"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/subscriptions/{subscription_id}/events"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Replay window: return delivery events for a subscription (Spec-X7-Subscriptions).

Results are bounded to the configured replay window (default 24 h).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
